diagrams.title: Operator Precedence Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows hierarchy of arithmetic operators from highest to lowest precedence
diagrams.purpose: Remember precedence order: PUMAS - Parentheses, Unary, Multiplicative, Additive

diagrams.title: Pre vs Post Increment Flowchart
diagrams.description: Comparison of pre-increment and post-increment operations
elements: Pre-increment: Increment value → Use new value
Post-increment: Use value → Store copy → Increment original → Return copy
diagrams.purpose: Visualize when value changes in pre vs post increment/decrement

diagrams.title: Type Promotion Staircase
diagrams.description: Shows automatic type promotion order in arithmetic
diagrams.purpose: Understand how smaller types are promoted before arithmetic operations

diagrams.title: Integer Overflow Wraparound
diagrams.description: Visual representation of byte overflow behavior
diagrams.purpose: Understand how values wrap around when exceeding type limits
